parameters.query: SELECT id, scan_time, total_endpoints, passed, failed, timed_out, pass_rate, duration_ms, scan_type FROM gda_health_scans ORDER BY scan_time DESC LIMIT 30

parameters.jsCode:
if (!$env.GDA_API_KEY_2026 || !$env.GDA_DEPLOY_KEY_2026 || !$env.GDA_WEBHOOK_SECRET_2026) throw new Error('2026 auth env vars not set');
const endpoints = [
  {name: 'Opp Tracker', path: 'gda-opp-tracker', method: 'POST', body: {auth_key: $env.GDA_API_KEY_2026, action: 'list', limit: 1}, timeout: 15000},
  {name: 'Daily SITREP', path: 'gda-daily-sitrep', method: 'POST', body: {auth_key: $env.GDA_API_KEY_2026, action: 'latest'}, timeout: 10000},
  {name: 'Intel Feed', path: 'gda-intel-feed', method: 'POST', body: {auth_key: $env.GDA_API_KEY_2026}, timeout: 15000},
  {name: 'OODA Loop', path: 'gda-ooda', method: 'POST', body: {auth_key: $env.GDA_API_KEY_2026, action: 'history'}, timeout: 10000},
  {name: 'AI Agent', path: 'gda-chat-v2', method: 'POST', body: {auth_key: $env.GDA_API_KEY_2026, message: 'ping'}, timeout: 15000},
  {name: 'Capture Plan', path: 'gda-capture-plan', method: 'POST', body: {auth_key: $env.GDA_API_KEY_2026, action: 'list'}, timeout: 10000},
  {name: 'Risk Register', path: 'gda-risk', method: 'POST', body: {auth_key: $env.GDA_API_KEY_2026, action: 'list', limit: 1}, timeout: 10000},
  {name: 'Action Items', path: 'gda-action-items', method: 'POST', body: {auth_key: $env.GDA_API_KEY_2026, action: 'list'}, timeout: 10000},
  {name: 'Red Team', path: 'gda-red-team', method: 'POST', body: {auth_key: $env.GDA_API_KEY_2026, rfp_text: 'health ping', review_type: 'quick'}, timeout: 10000},
  {name: 'Competitor Watchlist', path: 'gda-competitor-watchlist', method: 'POST', body: {auth_key: $env.GDA_API_KEY_2026, action: 'list'}, timeout: 10000},
  {name: 'Competitor Threat', path: 'gda-competitor-threat-score', method: 'POST', body: {auth_key: $env.GDA_API_KEY_2026}, timeout: 10000},
  {name: 'Trends', path: 'gda-trends', method: 'POST', body: {auth_key: $env.GDA_API_KEY_2026, action: 'latest'}, timeout: 10000},
  {name: 'Vehicle Tracker', path: 'gda-vehicle-tracker', method: 'POST', body: {auth_key: $env.GDA_API_KEY_2026, action: 'list'}, timeout: 10000},
  {name: 'Win Loss', path: 'gda-win-loss', method: 'POST', body: {auth_key: $env.GDA_API_KEY_2026, action: 'list'}, timeout: 10000},
  {name: 'Ops Dashboard', path: 'gda-ops-dashboard-data', method: 'POST', body: {auth_key: $env.GDA_API_KEY_2026}, timeout: 10000},
  {name: 'Pwin Calculator', path: 'gda-pwin-calculator', method: 'POST', body: {auth_key: $env.GDA_API_KEY_2026, action: 'list'}, timeout: 10000},
  {name: 'Daily Actions', path: 'gda-daily-actions-list', method: 'POST', body: {auth_key: $env.GDA_API_KEY_2026}, timeout: 10000},
  {name: 'Email Drafter', path: 'gda-email-drafter', method: 'POST', body: {auth_key: $env.GDA_API_KEY_2026, subject: 'ping', original_email: 'ping'}, timeout: 10000},
  {name: 'Opp Search', path: 'gda-opp-search', method: 'POST', body: {auth_key: $env.GDA_API_KEY_2026, query: 'SOCOM'}, timeout: 15000},
  {name: 'NDAA Ingest', path: 'gda-ndaa-ingest', method: 'POST', body: {auth_key: $env.GDA_API_KEY_2026, action: 'list'}, timeout: 10000},
  {name: 'IDIQ Tracker', path: 'gda-idiq-tracker', method: 'POST', body: {auth_key: $env.GDA_API_KEY_2026, action: 'list'}, timeout: 10000},
  {name: 'Relationship Tracker', path: 'gda-relationship-tracker', method: 'POST', body: {auth_key: $env.GDA_API_KEY_2026, action: 'list'}, timeout: 10000},
  {name: 'Wargame', path: 'gda-wargame', method: 'POST', body: {auth_key: $env.GDA_API_KEY_2026, action: 'list'}, timeout: 10000},
  {name: 'Incumbent Analysis', path: 'gda-incumbent-list', method: 'POST', body: {auth_key: $env.GDA_API_KEY_2026}, timeout: 10000},
  {name: 'Black Hat', path: 'gda-black-hat', method: 'POST', body: {auth_key: $env.GDA_API_KEY_2026, action: 'ping'}, timeout: 10000},
  {name: 'PPTX Gen', path: 'gda-pptx-health', method: 'POST', body: {auth_key: $env.GDA_API_KEY_2026}, timeout: 10000}
];
return [{json: {endpoints, startTime: Date.now()}}];

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({status: 'ok', pass_rate: $('Run Checks').first().json.pass_rate + '%', passed: $('Run Checks').first().json.passed, failed: $('Run Checks').first().json.failed, timed_out: $('Run Checks').first().json.timed_out, total: $('Run Checks').first().json.total_endpoints, duration_ms: $('Run Checks').first().json.duration_ms, results: $('Run Checks').first().json.results}) }}
